caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing northeast winds of 23 kt and wave heights of 5.1 ft, while Martinique has lighter conditions with winds of 11 kt. I expect the western Caribbean to see the most significant marine impacts today, with a 41% chance of rain near Roatan and waves driven by the dominant northeast swell.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Haifa is experiencing west-northwesterly winds of up to 16 kt and wave heights reaching 9.9 ft, with a 66% chance of rain, while Lisbon faces similar conditions with winds of 15 kt. I expect these conditions to impact maritime operations in both the Eastern and Western Mediterranean, particularly for smaller vessels that may be susceptible to the elevated wave heights and gusty winds.
